name: hospitality procurement officers managing 10-20 suppliers tool
description: For hospitality procurement officers processing 10-20 suppliers, inconsistent inventory levels cause stockouts. We automate weekly inventory restock alerts instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem_solved: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts
features: manual input for current inventory levels
